antiCrawlerConfig.captchaScript: (function(){KazumiCaptcha.log('LMM smart verify script started');var tries=0;var submitted=false;function token(ts){if(window._0x_lmm_crypto&&typeof window._0x_lmm_crypto.gen==='function'){return window._0x_lmm_crypto.gen(ts);}if(typeof md5==='function'){return md5(String(ts)+'MySecretlmm2026');}return '';}function submit(){if(submitted){return;}if(typeof $==='undefined'||typeof $.post!=='function'){return;}var ts=Math.floor(Date.now()/1000);var smartToken=token(ts);if(!smartToken){return;}submitted=true;KazumiCaptcha.log('LMM smart_verify posting');KazumiCaptcha.clicked();$.post(((window.maccms&&maccms.path)||'')+'/index.php/ajax/smart_verify',{smart_token:smartToken,ts:ts},function(r){KazumiCaptcha.log('LMM smart_verify response: '+JSON.stringify(r));if(r&&r.code==1){setTimeout(function(){try{location.reload();}catch(e){}},100);setTimeout(function(){KazumiCaptcha.done();},1500);}else{submitted=false;}},'json').fail(function(xhr,status,error){submitted=false;KazumiCaptcha.log('LMM smart_verify failed: '+status+' '+error);});}var timer=setInterval(function(){tries++;submit();if(submitted||tries>=40){clearInterval(timer);if(!submitted){KazumiCaptcha.log('LMM smart_verify dependencies not ready');}}},500);submit();return false;})()
